title: 11Pc Insulated Screwdriver Set - Soft Grip Handles, Flat Phillips with Case | DIY Professional Multi Purpose, Home & Workshop Use | Durable Carry Case
features: 11PC SCREWDRIVER SET - Insulated chrome vanadium shafts with hardened and tempered tips. 2 colour soft grip handles. Expertly crafted with safety in mind and VDE tested, each screw driver features an insulated dielectric substance that prevents electrical conduction to the user's hand. Stay protected while working with confidence!

HIGHLY EFFICIENT - Comprising of both cross-head and flat head screwdrivers in different sizes, making this set ideal as an electricians screwdriver set. The magnetic tips ensure effortless alignment with screw heads, preventing accidental drops, making your work more efficient and hassle-free.

HARDENED TIPS - Crafted from high-quality tempered chrome vanadium steel, these screw drivers sets with hardened black point tips offer exceptional durability. Rest assured, these tough tips have stood the test of time, even with extensive use. These electricians tools are built to last, ensuring reliability for every task.

ERGONOMIC - These electrical screwdriver sets allow you to experience enhanced control with our ergonomic hex anti-roll design, ensuring a secure, non-slip grip. The handles on each electric screwdriver are thoughtfully sized, providing ample torque to tackle even the tightest screws.

CARRY CASE - Elevate your toolkit with our insulated screwdriver set, conveniently kept in a practical storage case. Safely store and transport your screwdrivers wherever you go, ensuring they remain organised, secure, and always within reach.
description: Description: 11 piece screwdriver set Insulated chrome vanadium shafts with hardened and tempered tips. 2 colour soft grip handles. 1 x Slotted 2.5mm x 75mm. 1 x Slotted 3mm x 100mm. 1 x Slotted 4mm x 100mm. 1 x Slotted 5mm x 125mm. 1 x Slotted 6mm x 150mm. 1 x Slotted 8mm x 175mm. 1 x Phillips PH0 x 60mm. 1 x Phillips PH0 x 75mm. 1 x Phillips PH1 x 80mm. 1 x Phillips PH1 x 100mm. 1 x Phillips PH2 x 100mm. Storage carry case.
